overall.description: Gameplay footage from a driving simulator showing a yellow vehicle traveling on rural highways through forested and mountainous terrain. The vehicle passes under large metal truss bridges, navigates winding roads with guardrails, and encounters other traffic at intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural highway beneath metal truss bridge

events.description: driving under large metal bridge structure entering shaded corridor
overtaking slow-moving green tractor on the right side of road

agents.ego_description: following a tractor at moderate speed and passing it on the right while driving under the bridge

notable_agents.action: green tractor driving slowly in same lane, overtaken by ego vehicle

entered.detail: large steel bridge structure with triangular trusses spanning the road
steep rocky hillside with sparse shrubs and exposed stone
tall pine trees densely packed along the right roadside
wooden electrical power pole with crossbars

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath a massive metal truss bridge that creates a partial canopy over the two-lane highway. To the left is a rocky cliff face while evergreen trees line the right side. The camera follows and overtakes a slow green tractor, emerging from the shaded bridge area toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural highway intersection with abandoned brick structure

events.description: exiting shaded bridge area into bright direct sunlight
initiating right turn at rural highway intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection with road signs and making a right turn onto a different highway

entered.detail: large green directional sign with white lettering indicating routes
dilapidated red brick building with boarded windows near intersection
weathered wooden post fence along the right roadside
silver steel guardrail beginning at the curve

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shaded bridge corridor into bright sunlight, the vehicle approaches a rural intersection marked by a green highway sign and an abandoned brick building. The camera makes a right turn onto a new road lined with wooden fences and metal guardrails, transitioning from rocky terrain to more open surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest mountain road with continuous guardrails

events.description: black sedan passes in opposite direction on left side
white sedan passes in opposite direction on left side

agents.ego_description: navigating winding curves through dense forest while passing oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in opposite direction on the winding road
white sedan approaching from opposite direction around a curve

entered.detail: thick evergreen tree cover creating dappled shade over the roadway
small rustic wooden house with porch nestled among trees
secondary metal bridge structure visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a winding mountain road densely shaded by evergreen forest canopy. Metal guardrails line both sides of the asphalt as the road curves through the terrain. A wooden cabin appears briefly on the right, and the vehicle passes two oncoming sedans while driving under the partial cover of a secondary metal overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy rural highway intersection with crossing traffic

events.description: exiting forested winding road into open intersection area
semi truck and motorcycle crossing intersection from right to left
executing left turn through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching busy intersection, yielding to crossing traffic including a truck and motorcycle, then completing a left turn

notable_agents.action: white semi truck with flatbed trailer crossing the intersection from right to left
motorcycle crossing ahead of the semi truck through the intersection

entered.detail: tall lattice-style metal electricity transmission tower
wide asphalt intersection with multiple approach roads and crossing lanes
green directional highway sign on the left approach

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense forest into a wide open intersection, the vehicle approaches a busy crossing marked by an electricity pylon on the left. A semi truck and motorcycle cross from right to left ahead of the vehicle. After yielding, the camera executes a left turn through the intersection, transitioning from the winding mountain road to a new highway direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the shaded depths of a mountain pass into a bright, open rural intersection. It begins beneath a massive metal truss bridge, passing a rocky cliff and overtaking a slow green tractor as it emerges from the shadows into bright sunlight. The camera then navigates a right turn at a rural intersection marked by an abandoned brick building, transitioning from rocky terrain to a winding mountain road lined with wooden fences and dense evergreen canopies. As the vehicle curves through the forest, passing a wooden cabin and oncoming sedans under a secondary overpass, the scenery gradually opens up. Finally, the camera breaks through the dense trees into a wide intersection featuring an electricity pylon, yielding to a semi truck and motorcycle before executing a left turn onto a new highway.
